回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 新聞英文 (English for Journalism)	開課班級 : 應英三乙	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 周晏安	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course is designed for non-native English speakers who are interested in developing the skills needed for a career in modern journalism. In this course, you will explore print and digital media through authentic readings and video lectures, while expanding your vocabulary and increasing your ability to read, research, and develop local and global news stories. 


2.教學綱要
Unit 1 will provide an introduction to the history and principles of journalism. In unit 2, you will learn how to research, pitch, and interview. The next unit in the course will focus on the language needed to write newspaper and magazine articles, while unit 4 will cover the basics of broadcasting the news. In the final unit of the course, you will analyze the growth, impact, and challenges of digital news, while completing a reflection assignment that allows you to think about and discuss the recent changes to the field of journalism.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
1. Class Participation 30% (15% Class attendance: active participation, overall preparedness, skill development, etc; 15% In-class pair/group involvement) 2. Quizzes & Homework 20% 3. Midterm mini-group oral presentation 25% 4. Final group oral presentation 25% 
1. Self-respect at all aspects. 2. No any smart phone allowed. 3. Absence or any late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with the professor. Extra credit with blue card for : 1. Early bird 2. Active learners with volunteer involvement
